---
title: "Research Categories"
page-layout: full
---

Reproducible explorations for the TimeAnalysis project, grouped by research area.

<section class="category-grid" aria-label="Research categories">
  <a class="research-section-card" href="model-strategies.html">
    <img src="assets/model-zoo-backtest-comparison-cover-pencil.png" alt="Model comparison notebook cover">
    <span class="section-card-body">
      <span class="section-card-kicker">1 study</span>
      <span class="section-card-title">Models &amp; Strategies</span>
      <span class="section-card-text">Trading models, forecasting approaches, and backtesting workflows.</span>
    </span>
  </a>
  <a class="research-section-card" href="educational.html">
    <img src="assets/math-behind-neural-networks-cover-pencil.png" alt="Neural network math notebook cover">
    <span class="section-card-body">
      <span class="section-card-kicker">4 studies</span>
      <span class="section-card-title">Educational</span>
      <span class="section-card-text">All current notebooks, tutorials, and mathematical foundations for the research stack.</span>
    </span>
  </a>
  <a class="research-section-card" href="project-infrastructure.html">
    <img src="assets/freqtrade-backtester-smoke-test-cover-pencil.png" alt="Freqtrade smoke test notebook cover">
    <span class="section-card-body">
      <span class="section-card-kicker">0 study</span>
      <span class="section-card-title">Infrastructure</span>
      <span class="section-card-text">Runtime checks and service-level notes for reproducible experiments.</span>
    </span>
  </a>
  <a class="research-section-card" href="exploratory-data-analysis.html">
    <img src="assets/component-analysis-cover-pencil.png" alt="Component analysis notebook cover">
    <span class="section-card-body">
      <span class="section-card-kicker">0 study</span>
      <span class="section-card-title">EDA</span>
      <span class="section-card-text">Data structure, dimensionality reduction, and visualization research.</span>
    </span>
  </a>
</section>
